channel.title: Ft8 on Rowan Amateur Radio Society
channel.description: Recent content in Ft8 on Rowan Amateur Radio Society

item.title: FT8 Presentation: DXing in the Real World
item.description:
FT8: DXing in the Real World

At our April 2026 meeting, we had a presentation on FT8 – the popular weak-signal digital mode used for long-distance contacts. The slides cover how FT8 works, how to get on the air, and tips for making DX contacts.

Download the presentation (PDF)
